nodes.label: मन के भोले-भाले बादल
nodes.description: Chapter 1 - A poem about innocent clouds and imagination from Rimjhim textbook

nodes.label: कविता परिचय (Poem Introduction)
nodes.description: Overview of the poem about clouds, imagination, and childhood wonder

nodes.label: कवि (Poet)
nodes.description: The poet who wrote this beautiful poem about clouds and the mind

nodes.label: विषय: बादल और कल्पना
nodes.description: The poem's subject is clouds seen through the lens of a child's imagination

nodes.label: संदेश: प्रकृति की सुंदरता
nodes.description: Message: Nature is beautiful when seen with imagination and wonder

nodes.label: बादलों का वर्णन (Cloud Description)
nodes.description: How clouds are described in the poem - their forms, movements, and qualities

nodes.label: आकार बदलना (Changing Shapes)
nodes.description: Clouds change into shapes like elephants, horses, and mountains

nodes.label: भोलापन (Innocence)
nodes.description: Clouds are portrayed as innocent and carefree, like children

nodes.label: वर्षा लाना (Bringing Rain)
nodes.description: Clouds gather and bring rain, connecting to the water cycle

nodes.label: भाषा कौशल (Language Skills)
nodes.description: Vocabulary, poetic devices, and language concepts from the chapter

nodes.label: शब्दार्थ (Word Meanings)
nodes.description: Key Hindi vocabulary words and their meanings from the poem

nodes.label: उपमा अलंकार (Simile)
nodes.description: Comparing clouds to children and other things using simile

nodes.label: पर्यायवाची शब्द (Synonyms)
nodes.description: Synonyms like आकाश-आसमान, बादल-मेघ used in the poem

nodes.label: कल्पना शक्ति (Power of Imagination)
nodes.description: The poem encourages children to use imagination to see beauty in nature
